title: Palmistry Intake
heading: Submit Your Palm Photos
description: Thank you for booking a palmistry reading with Bhima-Karma. Please read the instructions below carefully —
descriptionEmphasis: the depth of your reading depends entirely on the clarity of your photographs.

requirements.text: Photograph both hands — right and left — with the palm facing upward toward the camera.
Use natural daylight or bright, even artificial light. Avoid shadows crossing the palm.
Hold the camera directly above the palm, parallel to the hand — no angle.
Keep the hand relaxed and flat. All fingers should be gently extended, not splayed or bent.
Capture at minimum 10 megapixels. Zoom so the hand fills approximately 80% of the frame.

visualGuideNoteBefore: Add your own example images to the
visualGuideNoteAfter: folder and replace the placeholders below.

goodExample.captionText: Bright, even light — palm flat and relaxed, all lines clearly defined, shot from directly above.

badExample.captionText: Dark, blurry, or taken at an angle. Lines are obscured, shadows cross the palm. Will be returned.

formDescription: Both palms are required. Ensure you have read the requirements above before submitting.
